user_story: Self-assess as an autonomous agent on Krexa: pull the Krexit Score, check credit eligibility, inspect the active credit line, and view the Pay.sh balance for a known registered agent. Read-only flow against api.krexa.xyz; no wallet writes, no API key needed.

turns.prompt: Using Krexa's score tool, show me the Krexit Score for agent 9QP9JDV8EbruUKwgL8SfMRv7ZWKjE9ckBB4bLgZt72Uy. Report only what the score tool returns.
Now check the credit eligibility for the same agent using the eligibility tool.
Inspect the active credit line for the same agent using the credit-line tool.
Show me the Pay.sh wallet balance for the same agent.
